verses.1: May the LORD answer you in the day of trouble.
verses.2: send you help from the sanctuary,
verses.4: May he grant you your heart’s desire,
verses.5: We will triumph in your salvation.
verses.6: Now I know that the LORD saves his anointed.
verses.7: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses,
verses.8: They are bowed down and fallen,
